about.name: Bhavy Makadiya
about.bio: Hello, I'm Bhavy, a passionate Backend Developer with expertise in building scalable, production-ready systems. I specialize in Node.js, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL, with hands-on experience in real-time communication, cloud services, and AI integration. I'm dedicated to creating robust backend architectures that power meaningful user experiences.
about.summary: I have worked as a Backend Developer at Tibicle LLP, where I architected and deployed a scalable matchmaking platform with real-time chat, video/audio calls, and AI-powered matching. I also gained experience as a Database Developer at Knovos India, working on enterprise document review systems. My expertise spans full-stack development, database design, and cloud infrastructure.
about.education_summary: I am pursuing my B.Tech in Information Technology from Dharmsinh Desai University, Nadiad, building upon my Diploma in Computer Engineering from A. V. Parekh Technical Institute, Rajkot, where I achieved 9.40/10 CGPA.
about.extracurriculars: I have acquired several certifications and actively work on personal projects to enhance my technical skills. I'm passionate about problem-solving, active learning, and collaborating with teams to build innovative solutions.

education.relevantCourses: Software Engineering, Full Stack Development, Database Management Systems, Data Structures & Algorithms
Computer Programming, Database Management, Web Development, Software Engineering

experience.name: Tibicle LLP
experience.summary: Developed and deployed a scalable matchmaking platform backend using Node.js, TypeScript, Express.js, and PostgreSQL with real-time chat capabilities via Socket.IO. Acquired fundamental knowledge of Backend Development and successfully completed all assigned tasks.
highlights: Architected and deployed a production-ready Muslim matchmaking platform backend using Node.js, TypeScript, Express.js, and PostgreSQL, supporting 1000+ concurrent users with real-time chat via Socket.IO and video/audio calls through Agora RTC.

Implemented comprehensive authentication system with JWT-based access/refresh tokens, Passport.js strategies (Local + JWT), role-based access control (RBAC), and bcrypt password hashing, ensuring secure user sessions across 50+ API endpoints.

Designed and executed 32+ database migrations using Knex.js across 5 PostgreSQL schemas (users, master, chat, matching, accounting) managing 40+ tables with complex relationships, foreign keys, and cascade rules for data integrity.

Built end-to-end In-App Purchase (IAP) system integrating Apple App Store and Google Play Billing APIs with automated webhook processing for subscription renewals, cancellations, and receipt validation, reducing manual intervention by 95%.

Integrated AWS S3 for scalable media storage with CloudFront CDN for optimized content delivery, implementing signed URLs with 50-minute expiry for secure access to user photos, videos, and documents.

Developed multi-channel notification system with Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) and Apple Push Notification service (APNs), delivering 8 categories of notifications with deep linking support for seamless mobile app navigation.
Integrated SendGrid and Brevo for transactional email delivery using Nodemailer with EJS templating, supporting user registration, password reset, OTP verification, and wali invitation workflows.

Implemented Didit KYC API for identity verification with facial recognition (75% match threshold), document validation, and multi-step approval workflow, enhancing platform trust and security compliance.
Built AI-powered matchmaking engine using OpenAI API to analyze personality traits, values, and quiz responses, generating compatibility scores and weekly match batches through automated cron jobs.

Developed intelligent engagement system with 3 automated cron jobs (node-cron) for relationship milestone nudges (Day 2, 30, 36), conversation activity monitoring, and gentle engagement reminders with 14-day frequency caps.

Created modular microservices architecture with 27+ feature modules (auth, chat, matches, payments, notifications, quiz, growth hub) following Container Pattern, Repository Pattern, and Service Layer Pattern for maintainable codebase.

Implemented comprehensive request validation using Joi schemas across all endpoints, error handling middleware, SQL injection prevention through Knex parameterized queries, and CORS configuration for API security.

experience.name: Knovos India Pvt. Ltd
highlights: Designed and developed relational database schemas to support large-scale document assessment operations for enterprise document review and legal case management system.
Wrote complex SQL queries and optimized database performance for high-volume data processing using MS SQL Server 2019.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to implement backend data solutions ensuring data accuracy and integrity.
Assisted in integrating database solutions with application layers to enhance the overall system functionality.
Implemented role-based access control, audit logging, case and folder management, and compliance tracking features.
Worked on structured data modeling, stored procedures, and optimization for secure and efficient legal data workflows.

projects.title: E-Discovery System
description: Developed and deployed a scalable document review system for legal investigations using ASP.NET Core MVC and MS SQL Server 2019.
Implemented role-based access control, audit logging, case and folder management, and compliance tracking features.
Worked on structured data modeling, stored procedures, and optimization for secure and efficient legal data workflows.
Designed dashboards and workflows for reviewers to tag, comment, and analyze documents.
Tech Stack: ASP.NET Core, ExtJS, SQL Server, Identity Framework, SMTP, Solr.

experience.name: DS Infoway
highlights: Acquired hands-on experience in web development, developing Full Stack web applications using JavaScript, ReactJS, HTML, CSS, Bootstrap.
Explored diverse methodologies of software maintenance, utilizing tools such as Git.
Worked on responsive web design and component-based architecture.
Collaborated with team members on code reviews and best practices.

projects.title: Yasara - Matchmaking Platform API
projects.description: A comprehensive backend system powering a faith-based relationship platform with AI-driven matching, real-time communication, and intelligent engagement features. Built with Node.js, TypeScript, Express.js, and PostgreSQL.
projects.toolsTech: Node.js, TypeScript, Express.js, PostgreSQL, Socket.IO, Agora RTC, AWS S3, Firebase, OpenAI API, Knex.js, JWT, Passport.js

projects.title: E-Discovery System

projects.toolsTech: ASP.NET Core, ExtJS, SQL Server, Identity Framework, SMTP, Solr

projects.title: Real Estate Property Selling
projects.description: A responsive platform for property listings and management using the MERN stack and Tailwind CSS. Implemented features such as user registration, reviews, an admin panel, JWT, and Google authentication.

projects.title: Book Store
projects.description: Full-stack application for book and author management, complete with dedicated user and admin interfaces. Leveraged Spring Boot for a scalable backend, ensuring efficient server-side operations and data management.

projects.title: News WebApp
projects.description: A React-based web application providing real-time news. Developed using React and Bootstrap, ensuring a cutting-edge, responsive, and user-friendly interface. Integrated the News API to provide real-time news updates.

projects.title: Indian Food Recipes
projects.description: A website-based platform providing recipes of famous Indian dishes. Designed to ensure a seamless and secure experience for both users and administrators with responsive interface crafted using Bootstrap.
